Revenue-sharing model preserves GitHub/community while plugging into cooperative manufacturing and fair payout rails.
founder_voice_quotes: We're building walls to keep bad actors out while the community thrives inside.

recipient: Armando Christian Perez (Pitbull) — performer and educator
key_claims: Uses 9 to 5 remix as daily motivator tying SLAM schools and worker dignity to cooperative economics.
Optional referral-only ask; links Dolly Parton and Jimmy Kimmel threads in the blessing cluster.
founder_voice_quotes: Dale.
It's the opposite of all taking and no giving.

recipient: Slant 3D Team — high-volume print farm / filament supplier
key_claims: Targets scale manufacturing for hydraulic terrain tiles; references one-pager revenue band ($90k-$270k annually) as concrete economics.
Partner retains farms, filament business, YouTube channel, and other clients—LB brings designs and coordinated demand.
founder_voice_quotes: Your capacity + our designs + your filament = a manufacturing partnership that prints money.

recipient: Taylor Swift — Maestro Mentor, Lady Banyan of the Stage (JukeBox Crown)
key_claims: Formal JukeBox Crown offer: cooperative music licensing rails with creator-set pricing, coded splits, and on-chain verification; Bruck'lyn Moonshot cited as precedent.
V04 benefit table includes medallion/ceremony, guild hierarchy, veto window, perpetual JukeBox revenue share.
One Crown, singular offer; asks for critique of weak points and optionally licensing Out of the Woods (Taylor's Version) through the system.
founder_voice_quotes: Help Each Other Help Ourselves

recipient: TerraTiles Team — modular terrain manufacturer
key_claims: HexIsle adds gravity-fed water kinetic layer to TerraTiles-grade mechanical modularity—rivers, cascades, no batteries/pumps.
Explicitly positioned as amplification—not acquisition—preserving TerraTiles brand, designs, and customers via one-pager economics.
founder_voice_quotes: Modular terrain done right is an engineering challenge disguised as a creative one.

recipient: Vincent Staples — artist (Medallion Sponsorship; only celebrity offer for this structure)
key_claims: Trade: sponsor 50x$100 medallions ($5,000 total) in exchange for Founder-selected utility patent assignment upon non-provisional conversion.
Public open letter; explains medallion economics, Band Strategy docs, and Founder's first-10 self-funding skin in the game.
Six explicit why Vince reasons plus ZiWe interview quotes anchoring authenticity/signal.
founder_voice_quotes: Everyone deserves the Quan.
I just don't want anyone to perceive me as something I'm not.
